response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally strong generalist engineer with proven ability to architect and ship systems at scale—his work on Dunnhumby's microservices infrastructure handling millions of requests per second demonstrates the systems-thinking and technical depth required. However, the role is highly specialized in growth and experimentation systems (A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, metrics infrastructure, statistical analysis), and his resume shows zero evidence of working in this domain. While his software craftsmanship fundamentals, leadership experience, and ability to work across teams are excellent fits, the lack of specific experimentation systems expertise makes him a risky Principal-level hire for this specialized area without significant ramp time.
strengths: Extensive scale experience building foundational systems (Dunnhumby's microservices handling millions of requests/sec) demonstrates ability to architect systemic solutions enabling multiple teams
Rare polyglot mastery across C, C++, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript with hands-on production experience at Staff/Senior level across multiple technical domains
Strong emphasis on software craftsmanship, testing culture, and knowledge sharing (TDD, CI/CD, public workshops and mentoring) aligns with Principal IC values
concerns: No demonstrated experience building experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, or feature flagging systems—the core technical focus of this Principal role
No evidence of working with telemetry infrastructure, metrics collection, or statistical analysis of experimental data despite the role requiring 'high data aptitude'

Career has been as a generalist across web/mobile/desktop/embedded rather than deep specialization in growth engineering; primarily European mid-scale companies rather than global-scale experimentation platforms
